chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 1197 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.04.2025. Mr. Abdul Mujeeb sheikh, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Ghulam Abbass Kuber, AAG. ******************* Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not wish to press this constitutional petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
